options.a: thrust is the component of the total aerodynamic force on the propeller parallel to the rotational axis.
options.b: the force contributing to propeller torque is perpendicular to the propeller plane of rotation.
options.c: the total aerodynamic force on a blade element may be resolved into two components, torque and lift.
options.d: thrust is the component of the total aerodynamic force on the propeller in the plane of rotation.
